heading: Bureau of Engraving and Printing
label: 303 Bureau of Engraving and Printing
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)30331:171.(4th proviso on p. 18), .June 4, 1897, ch. 2, § 130 Stat. 18In subsection (a), the words “a bureau in the Department of the Treasury” are added for clarity and consistency in chapter 3 of the revised title.In subsection (b), the first sentence is substituted for the words before the first comma because of the source provisions restated in section 321(c) of the revised title. Clause (1) is substituted for “subject to the direction of the Secretary of the Treasury” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code. The words “and be responsible” are omitted as being included in “reports directly to” and because of section 301 of the revised title.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)30331:171.(4th proviso on p. 18), .June 4, 1897, ch. 2, § 130 Stat. 18In subsection (a), the words “a bureau in the Department of the Treasury” are added for clarity and consistency in chapter 3 of the revised title.In subsection (b), the first sentence is substituted for the words before the first comma because of the source provisions restated in section 321(c) of the revised title. Clause (1) is substituted for “subject to the direction of the Secretary of the Treasury” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code. The words “and be responsible” are omitted as being included in “reports directly to” and because of section 301 of the revised title.

children.label: a
children.text: The Bureau of Engraving and Printing is a bureau in the Department of the Treasury.
shall carry out duties and powers prescribed by the Secretary; and
